{{CargoClone
|name=Skating Princess
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=107
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=Per 10% HP lost, {race} ATK +60
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Mecha Minion Recovery SPD +2.5%
|}}
